name: Cheers - Friends. Reunion. Goa.
overview: Planning the ultimate Goa trip with friends is on everyone's bucket list. It is a place where we can forget all the worries in the world and have a time of our lives with our squad.

trailers.title: Cheers - Friends. Reunion. Goa | Web Series | Official Trailer | Releasing on 19th Nov | Cheers!
